print\('=== 9_interobserver_summary ==='\)

df8 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '8_interobserver_per_particip'\)
print\(f'\\n=== 8_interobserver_per_particip \(first 5\) ==='\)
print\(df8.head\(\).to_string\(index=False\)\)

df6 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '6_threshold'\)
print\(f'\\n6_threshold: {len\(df6\)} rows'\)
df4 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '4_supine_distances'\)
print\(f'4_supine_distances: {len\(df4\)} rows'\)

from pathlib import Path
plot = Path\('output/figs/sensitivity_sweep_threshold.png'\)
print\(f'\\nPlot exists: {plot.exists\(\)}, size: {plot.stat\(\).st_size / 1024:.0f} KB'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/jxu759/Documents/motion-landmarks && "C:\\Users\\jxu759\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python310\\python.exe" -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
import pandas as pd

xls = pd.ExcelFile\('output/landmark_curation_analysis_2026_03_11.xlsx'\)

df7 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '7_interobserver_per_landmark'\)
print\('=== Sheet 7: per-landmark \(first 10\) ==='\)
print\(df7.head\(10\).to_string\(index=False\)\)
print\(f'\\nTotal: {len\(df7\)} landmarks across {df7[\\"Subject\\"].nunique\(\)} subjects'\)

df8 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '8_interobserver_per_particip'\)
print\(f'\\n=== Sheet 8: per-participant \(first 10\) ==='\)
print\(df8.head\(10\).to_string\(index=False\)\)
print\(f'\\nSummary of per-participant means:'\)
print\(df8['Mean_distance'].describe\(\).to_string\(\)\)

df9 = pd.read_excel\(xls, '9_interobserver_summary'\)
print\(f'\\n=== Sheet 9: summary ==='\)
for _, r in df9.iterrows\(\):
    est = r['Estimate']
    sd = r['SD']
    cl = r['CI_lower']
    cu = r['CI_upper']
    est_s = f'{est:.3f}' if pd.notna\(est\) else 'n/a'
    sd_s = f'+/-{sd:.3f}' if pd.notna\(sd\) else ''
    ci_s = f'[{cl:.3f}, {cu:.3f}]' if pd.notna\(cl\) else ''
    print\(f'  {r[\\"Method\\"]}: {est_s} {sd_s} {ci_s}'\)
    print\(f'    {r[\\"Note\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Users/jxu759/Documents/motion-landmarks/scripts && "C:\\Users\\jxu759\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python310\\python.exe" -c "
from landmark_curation_analysis import *
import pandas as pd
xls = pd.ExcelFile\(str\(INPUT_EXCEL\)\)
df_anthony = pd.read_excel\(xls, 'anthony'\)
df_holly = pd.read_excel\(xls, 'holly'\)
df_raw = build_raw_all\(df_anthony, df_holly\)
df_cur = build_matched_curated\(df_raw\)
df_nf = build_no_fibroadenoma\(df_cur\)
df_dist = build_supine_distances\(df_nf\)
df_th = build_threshold\(df_dist\)
plot_bland_altman\(df_th, FIGS_DIR / 'bland_altman_interobserver.png'\)
" 2>&1)
